name: Fusée Linceul
description: Chasseur léger autonome, drone spatial d'interception. Conçu en masse, chaque Linceul est piloté par un crâne greffé. Ils meurent par centaines mais remplissent leur objectif.
prompt: Sci-fi grimdark cyberpunk, L'Omni-Réseau faction. Small autonomous interceptor fighter, angular dark grey wedge-shaped drone spacecraft, single human skull fused into cockpit as pilot-computer, cold blue neural glow from eye sockets, geometric minimal weapons, mass-produced look with barcode serials on wings. Swarm formation of identical fighters in background. Space battlefield. Cinematic lighting, highly detailed.
